summary: Shared Helper Extraction tests verified - all 90 tests passed across 4 test suites. 6 utility helpers successfully extracted from server.py into 3 dedicated service modules: vendor_name_helpers.py (normalize_vendor_name, calculate_fuzzy_score, VENDOR_ALIAS_MAP), dashboard_helpers.py (aggregate_document_types_data), bc_api_helpers.py (get_bc_companies, get_bc_sales_orders). All router consumers rewired. Route count stable at 427. No API contract changes.

minor.issue: Returns 500 due to invalid BC credentials - PRE-EXISTING issue, not caused by this change
